phrases.intent_en: Ask where the seafood stalls are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde están los puestos de pescado y marisco?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh eh-STAHN los PWEHS-tohs deh pes-KAH-doh ee mah-REES-koh?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, a la izquierda del pasillo.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, left of the aisle.

responses.english: At the back, left of the aisle.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah DEHL pah-SEEL-loh
responses.french: Al fondo, a la izquierda del pasillo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat at the market
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se puede comer dentro?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh seh PWEH-deh koh-MER den-TROH?

likely_response.local: En los puestos centrales, junto al pescado fresco.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LOHS poo-EH-stohs thehnt-RAH-lehs HOON-toh AHL peh-SKAH-doh FREH-skoh
likely_response.translation_en: There are bars at the back, near exit.

responses.english: There are bars at the back, near exit.
responses.phonetic: EHN LOHS poo-EH-stohs thehnt-RAH-lehs HOON-toh AHL peh-SKAH-doh FREH-skoh
responses.french: En los puestos centrales, junto al pescado fresco.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which stall has the best cheese
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué puesto tiene el mejor queso?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, keh PWEHS-toh TYEH-neh el meh-HOR KEH-soh

likely_response.local: Pruebe en el puesto número cinco, al centro.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-EH-beh EHN EHL poo-EH-stoh NÚ-meh-roh THEEN-koh AHL THEHNT-roh
likely_response.translation_en: Try at stall number five, in the center.

responses.english: Try at stall number five, in the center.
responses.phonetic: proo-EH-beh EHN EHL poo-EH-stoh NÚ-meh-roh THEEN-koh AHL THEHNT-roh
responses.french: Pruebe en el puesto número cinco, al centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if they can pack fish for travel
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿pueden envasar el pescado para viajar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿poo-EH-den em-bah-SAHR el pes-KAH-doh pah-rah byah-HAHR?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, some stalls offer that service.

responses.english: Yes, some stalls offer that service.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main iron entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada de hierro histórica?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah ehn-TRAH-dah deh YEH-roh ee-stoh-REE-kah?

likely_response.local: Es la fachada principal, frente a la calle.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHS LAH fahth-AH-dah preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH LAH KAHL-leh
likely_response.translation_en: It's the main facade, facing the street.

responses.english: It's the main facade, facing the street.
responses.phonetic: EHS LAH fahth-AH-dah preen-thee-PAHL FREHN-teh AH LAH KAHL-leh
responses.french: Es la fachada principal, frente a la calle.
